# PromptNG

> A modular CLI for composing, managing, and orchestrating reusable AI prompt components.

## Overview

- Modular prompt building system with roles, tasks, patterns, and agents
- Pre/post prompt control layers for fine-grained behavior control
- Variable injection via `--var`, `--var-file`, `--var-dir`
- Unix-friendly output for pipeline integration

## Quick Start

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
chmod +x main.py

pp build math_tutor --var input="Explain recursion"
pp compose --role tutor --task explain --pattern step_by_step --var input="Boolean algebra"
```

## Project Structure

- `prompts/roles/` - Role/persona definitions (tutor, executor, technical_instructor)
- `prompts/tasks/` - Task templates (explain, action, compose_action)
- `prompts/patterns/` - Reasoning/output patterns (step_by_step, socratic, structured_output)
- `prompts/agents/` - Agent presets combining components
- `prompts/controls/pre/` - Pre-prompt execution controls (model, mode, tools, memory)
- `prompts/controls/post/` - Post-prompt behavior controls (translation, tone, limits, truth)
- `docs/` - Full documentation and tutorials
- `main.py` - CLI entry point (symlinked as `pp`)

## CLI Reference

- `pp build <agent>` - Build prompt from agent preset with optional controls
- `pp compose` - Compose prompt from role, task, and pattern components
- `pp list <category>` - List available components (roles, tasks, patterns, agents, controls)
- `pp show <path>` - Display component content

## Control Layers

- **Pre-controls** (`prompts/controls/pre/`) - Define execution environment and model behavior
- **Post-controls** (`prompts/controls/post/`) - Shape output formatting, tone, and constraints

## Documentation

- README.md - Complete project documentation
- docs/prompt_control_layers.md - Pre/post control system guide
- docs/creating_new_prompt_components.md - Tutorial for creating components
- docs/create_and_use_a_pattern_group.md - Pattern group tutorial
- docs/the_iceberg_of_prompting.md - Prompting concepts framework
- docs/command_usage.md - Full CLI command reference
